mapper.select: SELECT a.id, a.project_id AS "projectId", a.version, a.attachments, a.solution_explanation AS "solutionExplanation", a.annotation, a.defrost_explanation AS "defrostExplanation", a.apply_defrost_at AS "applyDefrostAt", a.signature_url AS "signatureUrl", a.signed_at AS "signedAt", a.status, a.created_by AS "createdBy", a.updated_by AS "updatedBy", a.created_at AS "createdAt", a.updated_at AS "updatedAt", p.code AS "projectCode", p.name AS "projectName", creator.name AS "createdByName", updater.name AS "updatedByName", CASE a.status WHEN 1 THEN '待提交' WHEN 2 THEN '待确认' WHEN 3 THEN '已确认' WHEN 4 THEN '已冻结' WHEN 5 THEN '解冻中' WHEN 6 THEN '已完成' ELSE '' END AS "statusText" FROM solution_design a LEFT JOIN project p ON p.id = a.project_id LEFT JOIN sys_account creator ON creator.id = a.created_by LEFT JOIN sys_account updater ON updater.id = a.updated_by WHERE a.id = #{id}
